_provenance: SYNTHETIC, real-SHAPED Open-Meteo Archive (archive-api.open-meteo.com/v1/archive) pressure-level response for METX-01 offline derivation tests. NOT a captured live response (no copyright/attribution concern); hand-authored to exercise a temperature INVERSION (T rising with height) + wind shear (speed rising with height), wind FROM the west (270deg -> downwind bearing 90deg). elevation is AMSL site elevation; geopotential_height_*hPa are AMSL and MUST be converted to AGL by subtracting elevation before fitting (Pitfall 5). One hour only (D-01 single representative hour). No network/Python needed at test time (mirrors tests/fixtures/cog provenance).
